sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91492" key="pulhdo/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠληδόκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n91492.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">watching at the door</tr_>, of Hermes, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
